section_title: In cases where the agent is personally liable, a person dealing with him
content:
233. In cases where the agent is personally liable, a person dealing with him
person
may hold either him or his principal, or both of them, liable.
dealing with
agent
Illustration
personally
liable A enters into a contract with B to sell him 100 bales of cotton, and afterwards
discovers that B was acting as agent for C. A may sue either B or C, or both,
for the price of the cotton.
Consequence
illustrations:
